title: MEPQ admitted; Option B Mission F opened; Option A Mission E remains deferred; operator radius-arm passport scrubbed
summary: Admit Missing Evidence Procurement Queue (MEPQ) as orthogonal evidence-procurement register under the Inversion Principle. Register MEPQ-001/002 (ICE CG/mass + trans XMBR) as DEFERRED with Mission E. Queue MEPQ-003 (LV firewall gateway) and open Mission F (MISN-000006) as discovery-only Option B. Reject operator PASSPORT radius-arm LEVEL_4 / invented torque/PN/BBLB Section 4 cite. Expand MISN-000003 to include KG-008.
inversion_principle: Procure only evidence that cannot be safely inferred; documentation tiers are purchased when a downstream node requires EXACT_CONFIGURATION_MATCH evidence.

option_selection.option_a_ice_deconstruction: REJECTED_FOR_NOW — MISN-000005 remains deferred; MEPQ-001/002 registered only
option_selection.option_b_lv_gateway: SELECTED — MISN-000006 discovery open questions; commercial EWD still via MISN-000003/000001
